name: Suspicious File Overwrite Using extrac32 Detected
description: Detects suspicious use of `extrac32.exe` to overwrite files. Adversaries may abuse this legitimate utility to overwrite critical system files as part of an attack, potentially for defense evasion or privilege escalation.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'extrac32.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the extrac32.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute extrac32.exe, including overwrite flags.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which extrac32.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
